title: Count the evens
prompt: Write count_evens(nums) that returns how many numbers in the list are even, using a loop.

details.restate: Look through the list and count how many of its numbers are even. Give back that count — a single number.

io.because: an empty list has nothing to count

help.plain: Walk the list and tally up only the even numbers.
help.analogy: Counting only the red cars that drive past — glance at each one, tick the reds, ignore the rest.
help.nudge: How do you test whether ONE number is even? (Think `% 2`.)
